title: Solana Blockchain Development
subtitle: Build on the fastest L1: programs, tokens, NFTs, and high-throughput apps.
tagline: The high-performance blockchain for real applications.
outcomes: Understand Solana's architecture: Proof of History, Tower BFT, parallel execution.
Build, deploy, and call Solana programs (smart contracts) in Rust.
Mint SPL tokens and NFTs; integrate Metaplex.
Use Anchor framework to ship programs faster and safer.
Connect a frontend with wallet adapters; sign transactions client-side.
Reason about fees, compute units, and scaling beyond a hackathon demo.

modules.title: Solana fundamentals
modules.objective: Understand the architecture that makes Solana fast.

modules.title: Programs (smart contracts)
modules.objective: Write and deploy native Solana programs in Rust.

modules.title: Anchor framework
modules.objective: Ship safer programs faster with Anchor.

modules.title: Tokens and NFTs
modules.objective: Mint, transfer, and manage SPL tokens + Metaplex NFTs.

modules.title: Frontend + production
modules.objective: Connect users; ship to mainnet responsibly.
